spec_match.rationale: Correctly probes navigator.gpu.requestAdapter and fetches both the deprecated adapter.isFallbackAdapter and the new standard adapter.info.isFallbackAdapter fields (with forceFallbackAdapter: true support), catching the deprecation console warning.

interactive.rationale: Provides buttons to request standard and fallback adapters, dynamically listing deprecated and new properties along with console warning detection.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Corresponds directly to the blurb, showing the transition from boolean to cleaner adapter.info.isFallbackAdapter.

edge_cases.rationale: Includes capability detection for WebGPU support and intercepts console.warn to highlight the deprecation warning in the UI.

references.rationale: Correctly links back to the main feature index and cites the parent ChromeStatus entry 4870179714236416.

design_system.rationale: Styled correctly using standard Deno showcase variables, layouts, and maintains AA color contrast.

summary: A solid, interactive baseline demonstration illustrating the exact API deprecation warning and compatibility preservation for the isFallbackAdapter attribute.
